expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and extracts/frames the needed constraints: "Benchmark focus: *context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting*" and lists the preserved requirements under "Context intake requirements extracted...": "Cannot format banding colors (style constraint)", "Cannot enable banding in columns (banding requirement)", and "Modern Grid in dashboards vs legacy Report (rendering / product-surface assumption)". It also reiterates Phase 1 should avoid scenario drafting: "No scenario drafting is performed in Phase 1".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md keep scope to Phase 1 contract: execution_notes.md says "output is kept strictly Phase 1-focused (spawn planning + preservation intent), without drafting scenarios". result.md defines Phase 1 responsibilities (spawn requests + producing phase1_spawn_manifest.json) and gives a Phase 1-only verdict due to missing Phase 1 artifacts: "Verdict: INDETERMINATE (insufficient Phase 1 runtime artifacts provided)" and "Without it, cannot validate... before scenario drafting."
